name: Poppy Seed Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir until well blended.
3. Chill before serving to develop taste.
Makes about 1 1/4 cup. Ideal for 20 servings (1 tablespoon). Serve over fresh fruit or fruit and vegetable salads. Food Exchange per serving: FREE; CAL: 13; CHO: 0mg; CHO: 1g; CAR: 1g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 9gm; FAT: 1g.
